ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speech sequence */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sequence */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speaker who recorded the sequence */,
  "sequence_description" TEXT /* Description of the sequence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sequence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sequence */,
  "recording_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sequence in seconds */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the speech sequence */,
  "background_noise" TEXT /* Level of background noise in the recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the speaker (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the speaker */,
  "accent" TEXT /* Accent of the speaker */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the speaker */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the speaker */,
  "professional_background" TEXT /* Professional background or occupation of the speaker */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the processing method (e.g., VM, LDV) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the processing method */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the processing method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the processing method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being evaluated */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processing method used */,
  "ssnr" REAL /* Speech Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SSNR) */,
  "llrmean" REAL /* Log-Likelihood Ratio Mean (LLRMean) */,
  "intelligibility" REAL /* Intelligibility score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was created */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score of the processing method */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES processing_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being accessed */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES evaluation_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the metadata belongs to */,
  "recording_location" TEXT /* Location where the sequence was recorded */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was recorded */,
  "recording_device" TEXT /* Device used for recording the sequence */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the sequence */,
  "recording_format" TEXT /* Format of the recording */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the recording file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the metadata belongs to */,
  "evaluation_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_device" TEXT /* Device used for the evaluation */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the evaluation in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_metadata_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES evaluation_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is assigned to */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the permission applies to */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the permission applies to */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can view the sequence or result */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can edit the sequence or result */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can delete the sequence or result */,
  "can_share" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can share the sequence or result */,
  "can_export" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can export the sequence or result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES evaluation_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)
